description: The IETF is the standards body that develops and publishes Internet technical standards and related working-group documents. Its Datatracker service provides public access to document, group, and process data used in IETF standards work.
summary: ietf.org exposes two documented HTTP integration surfaces on datatracker.ietf.org: a public Datatracker API and a separate Internet-Draft submission API with unclear documented auth mechanics; no first-party GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI surface was found on ietf.org hosts.
